name: noteyard-codex-plugin
description: Case-root review workflow and bounded MCP launcher for Noteyard.

interface.shortDescription: Review one Apple Notes case root with bounded MCP help.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the Noteyard review workflow, one-case-root-at-a-time MCP launcher, and a case-review skill without turning the repo into a hosted platform.
defaultPrompt: Use Noteyard to inspect the review_index before forming conclusions.
Use Noteyard to answer one bounded question from derived artifacts, not the live Notes store.
